pending.title: Senior Project Controls Engineer - Jubail Jobs, 63447576 | expatriates.com
pending.label: EXPAT PLANNING
pending.description: expatriates.com The online community for expatriates expatriates.com The online community for expatriates Home Subscribe Contact Us My Ads Place an Ad Senior Project Controls Engineer Home International Saudi Arabia Eastern Province Jubail Jobs Posted by: [email protected] Member since: October 2020 Posted: Category: Jobs Region: Jubail (Jubail) Posting ID: 63447576 Loading... Chat on WhatsApp Location: Jubail, Saudi Arabia Job Summary We are seeking an experienced Senior Project Controls Engineer to join our Head Office team. The successful candidate will be responsible for monitoring and controlling multiple construction and industrial projects, including cost control, progress measurement, forecasting, budgeting, invoicing projections, and management reporting. Key Responsibilities * Monitor and control project costs, budgets, and expenditures. * Track project progress against approved schedules and milestones. * Prepare weekly and monthly project performance reports. * Monitor actual versus planned progress and identify variances. * Develop project forecasts including revenue, cost, cash flow, and expected final results. * Review project productivity and resource utilization. * Prepare earned value analysis and project performance indicators. * Monitor project commitments, procurement status, and subcontractor costs. * Coordinate with Project Managers, Site Engineers, Procurement, and Finance departments. * Prepare monthly invoicing forecasts and support billing activities. * Identify project risks and recommend corrective actions. * Support management in decision-making through accurate project controls data and dashboards. * Maintain project control systems, records, and reporting tools. Requirements * Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering, Construction Management, or related field. * Minimum 7 years of experience in Project Controls, Cost Control, or Planning within construction, infrastructure, EPC, or industrial projects. * Strong knowledge of project cost management and forecasting. * Experience in managing multiple projects simultaneously. * Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel. * Experience with Primavera P6. * Experience with Power BI is preferred. * Strong analytical and reporting skills. * Excellent communication and coordination abilities. Preferred Experience * Experience in Saudi Aramco, SABIC, industrial, infrastructure, projects. * Familiarity with earned value management (EVM). * Experience preparing executive dashboards and management reports. Key Deliverables * Weekly Project Status Report. * Monthly Cost Report. * Monthly Progress Report. * Revenue & Invoice Forecast. * Cost Forecast (EAC & ETC). * Project Performance Dashboard. * Executive Management Summary. allJobs.title: Urgent Hiring: Senior Planning Engineer – Fire Protection Projects - Riyadh Jobs, 63445499 | expatriates.com
allJobs.label: EXPAT PLANNING
allJobs.description: expatriates.com The online community for expatriates expatriates.com The online community for expatriates Home Subscribe Contact Us My Ads Place an Ad Urgent Hiring: Senior Planning Engineer – Fire Protection Projects Home International Saudi Arabia Riyadh Province Riyadh Jobs Member since: November 2022 Posted: Category: Jobs Region: Riyadh Posting ID: 63445499 Loading... Chat on WhatsApp # Job Description: Senior Planning Engineer – Fire Protection Projects ## Position Title Senior Planning Engineer – Fire Protection Projects ## Location Riyadh ## Department Projects / Engineering ## Reports To Project Manager / Planning Manager ### Job Summary We are seeking an experienced Senior Planning Engineer with extensive expertise in fire protection and firefighting projects. The successful candidate will be responsible for project planning, scheduling, progress monitoring, resource allocation, delay analysis, and reporting throughout the project lifecycle. The role requires close coordination with project managers, engineering teams, procurement, subcontractors, and clients to ensure projects are completed on time and within budget. ### Key Responsibilities * Develop, maintain, and update detailed project schedules using Primavera P6 and/or Microsoft Project. * Prepare baseline schedules, work breakdown structures (WBS), resource-loaded schedules, and cash flow forecasts. * Monitor project progress against approved baselines and identify schedule deviations. * Conduct critical path analysis and recommend corrective actions to mitigate delays. * Prepare weekly and monthly progress reports, dashboards, S-curves, earned value analysis, and KPI reports. * Coordinate with engineering, procurement, construction, testing, and commissioning teams to ensure schedule alignment. * Review project specifications, drawings, BOQs, and contract requirements to establish project timelines. * Track procurement activities for fire pumps, sprinkler systems, fire alarm systems, suppression systems, hydrant networks, and related fire protection equipment. * Analyze project risks and develop mitigation and recovery plans. * Prepare extension of time (EOT) claims, delay analysis reports, and supporting documentation when required. * Participate in project meetings with clients, consultants, subcontractors, and internal stakeholders. * Monitor manpower productivity and resource utilization to optimize project performance. * Support project management in forecasting project completion dates and identifying potential schedule impacts. * Ensure compliance with project contractual obligations, quality standards, and HSE requirements. ### Qualifications * Bachelor's Degree in Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Construction Management, or related discipline. * Professional certification in Primavera P6 is preferred. ### Experience Requirements * Minimum 8–12 years of planning and scheduling experience in construction projects. * At least 5 years of experience in fire protection, firefighting, and fire alarm system projects. * Proven experience with commercial, industrial, infrastructure, data center, oil & gas, or high-rise building fire protection projects. * Strong understanding of project controls, planning methodologies, and construction sequencing. * Experience in EPC and MEP project environments is highly desirable. ### Technical Skills * Advanced proficiency in Primavera P6. * Good working knowledge of Microsoft Project, Excel, Power BI, and project reporting tools. * Knowledge of NFPA standards, fire protection systems, and related construction practices. * Strong understanding of procurement, construction, testing, and commissioning activities for fire protection systems. * Familiarity with delay analysis techniques and earned value management (EVM). ### Competencies * Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills. * Strong communication and presentation abilities. * Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple projects simultaneously. * Strong leadership and coordination skills. * Attention to detail and commitment to project delivery excellence. ### Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) * Schedule adherence and milestone achievement. * Accuracy of project forecasts and reporting. * Timely identification and mitigation of schedule risks. * Resource utilization efficiency. * Successful delivery of project planning and control objectives. APPLY : [email protected] Back Next Email to a Friend Ask AI to Review This Ad Problem with this ad? Home International Saudi Arabia Riyadh Province Riyadh Jobs Posted by: [email protected] Member since: September 2024 Posted: Category: Jobs Region: Riyadh Posting ID: 63506633 We are looking for a maintenance planner for a prestigious opportunity in the plant sector in Saudi Arabia. As a maintenance planner, you will play a crucial role in ensuring the efficient operation and reliability of equipment through effective maintenance planning and scheduling. Your expertise will contribute to minimizing downtime and optimizing the maintenance processes, ensuring adherence to the highest safety standards. Key Responsibilities • Plan, schedule, and coordinate maintenance and shutdown activities. • Develop detailed job plans, resource allocation, and timelines. • Ensure maintenance plans align with operational and safety standards. • Utilize SAP systems for maintenance planning and reporting. • Collaborate with operations, maintenance, and procurement teams to ensure smooth execution. Qualifications & Experience • Bachelor’s degree in mechanical engineering (or related diploma). • Certification in planning and scheduling (CPSP or equivalent). • Proven experience in maintenance and shutdown planning. • Proficiency in SAP. • Experience in PLANT will be preferred. • Strong MS Office skills (Excel, Word, PowerPoint). • Good knowledge of data analytics tools (Power BI, Tableau) is an advantage. • Fluent in English; Arabic is a plus. Key Skills • Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities. • Excellent communication and teamwork skills. • Attention to detail and ability to manage multiple priorities. Resource Management: Support the monitoring and optimization of manpower, equipment, and construction materials.
